creator: ripley@pinguin.in-berlin.de
text:
The createuser script returns a failure on system()
	calling chpass. ("corrupted entry")

Fix: 

Created user manually with vipw.  I don't know too much
	about parameters to chpass.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Trying to run $PORTS/databases/mysql/scripts/createuser
	w/o having an msql user in /etc/passwd (UID 87)
